Inference
=================================

The ``inference.py`` module contains the functions for performing inference of discrete hidden states (categorical distributions) in POMDP generative models.

.. admonition:: Docxology

   State inference, MMP/FPI, VFE: ``docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md``. Gallery: ``examples/inference_and_learning/inference_methods_comparison.ipynb``. Lower-level API: :doc:`algos/index`. Legacy VFE notebook: ``docs/notebooks/free_energy_calculation.ipynb`` (see also ``examples/legacy/free_energy_calculation.ipynb``).

.. automodule:: pymdp.inference
    :members:
